arts.ttl: Bayern Munich boss Vincent Kompany proud of resilient Leon Goretzka
arts.sum: Surely, it could not have been a great feeling for Leon Goretzka last summer, when Bayern Munich board member for sport indicated that the 30-year-old should start looking for a new club. Speaking of coach Vincent Kompany, the manager is pleased with the way that Goretzka has handled the adversity.

arts.ttl: Predicted Champions League XIs | Bayer Leverkusen vs Bayern Munich
arts.sum: After the 3-0 defeat last week at the hands of Bayern Munich, Bayer Leverkusen will need something close to a miracle to turn their fortunes around. Both teams made vast…

arts.ttl: Nagelsmann issues warning to Pavlovic: "If his rhythm remains as it is now..."
arts.sum: Germany coach Julian Nagelsmann would like to see Aleksandar Pavlovic play more for Bayern Munich.

arts.ttl: BFW Question of the Day — March 11th: What’s your prediction for Bayer Leverkusen vs. Bayern Munich in the Champions League?
arts.sum: Given the injury to Florian Wirtz and the outstanding 3-0 difference on aggregate, Bayern Munich ’s Champions League match vs. I’ve got Bayern Munich as a 2-1 winner over Bayer Leverkusen.

arts.ttl: Right-back or central midfielder? Nagelsmann discusses Kimmich's role for Germany
arts.sum: A natural central midfielder, Joshua Kimmich has mostly been playing at right-back for Germany since Julian Nagelsmann took over. Will that continue?

arts.ttl: Jeremie Frimpong plans to leave Bayer Leverkusen in the summer
arts.sum: Sky Germany reports that Jeremie Frimpong is planning to leave Bayer Leverkusen this summer and has his eyes on a move to LaLiga. The Dutch international wanted to leave Leverkusen last…

arts.ttl: Goretzka discusses possible return to Germany squad
arts.sum: Leon Goretzka hasn't represented Germany since 2023. But could Julian Nagelsmann reward his fine form with a call-up?

arts.ttl: When can Florian Wirtz return from injury at the earliest?
arts.sum: Bayer Leverkusen have confirmed that Florian Wirtz will be sidelined for a number of weeks, but how long exactly will the Germany international be out for?

arts.ttl: FC Bayern Campus Round Up: What is going wrong with Bayern Munich’s youth teams?
arts.sum: Bayern won the first game against Köln in January with a 4-1 end result, but had to settle for a 0-2 loss today. A win would give Bayern a 6 point cushion over Bremen with 3 games to go, but a loss would put them on level terms heading into the final matches of the season.

arts.ttl: Report: How Harry Kane really feels about returning to Tottenham from Bayern Munich this summer
